#  Edit a Commitment Synced with ERP 
##### ERP DOCUMENTATION
**Each Procore-built ERP integration offers its own unique feature set.** Your integration might not support the action described on this page.
To learn about your integration and its supported features, see [Which ERP integrations are supported by Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-erp-integrations-are-supported-by-procore)
##  Background 
In some cases, you might need to edit a commitment that has been synced with your ERP system instead of creating a change order. Commitments can't be edited while in the 'Approved' status, and most commitment fields can't be edited while the contract is synced with ERP. Before you can edit a commitment, you may need to take steps like changing the status, or unlinking the commitment, before you can make the desired changes.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.  
OR
    * 'Standard' or 'Read Only' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool with the following granular permissions:
      * 'Update Purchase Order Contract' and/or 'Update Work Order Contract'


##  Steps 
  1. Complete any prerequisites required for your specific ERP integration.
  2. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool.
  3. Locate the desired commitment in the list of commitments.
  4. Click **Edit**.
  5. Make changes as needed.
  6. Click **Save.**
  7. Re-send the updated commitment to your ERP integration for accounting acceptance.


## See Also
  * [Unlink Commitments Synced with ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/unlink-commitments-synced-with-erp)
  * [Delete a Commitment Synced with ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/delete-a-commitment-synced-with-erp)
  * [Unlink CCOs Synced with ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/unlink-ccos-synced-with-erp)
title: Edit a Commitment Synced with ERP
description: How to edit a commitment in Procore after its been synced with your ERP system.
